cases.prompt: Set up GitHub Actions CI/CD pipeline with tests, linting, security scanning, and deploy to Forge
cases.expect: Creates .github/workflows/ci.yml with tests, lint, static-analysis, security jobs; creates .github/workflows/deploy.yml for Forge deployment; documents required secrets (FORGE_DEPLOY_URL, CODECOV_TOKEN)

cases.prompt: I want to configure GitLab CI for my Laravel app with parallel test and lint jobs
cases.expect: Creates .gitlab-ci.yml with build, test, lint, security stages; sets up MySQL and Redis services; configures parallel execution
